title: Trichophorum oliganthum
taxonomy: Trichophorum oliganthum is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. It is a type of sedge, commonly found in wetlands and alpine meadows. This plant is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and the Himalayas. Trichophorum oliganthum has been classified as a perennial herb, characterized by its simple leaves and small, yellowish flowers. Within the plant kingdom, Trichophorum oliganthum is classified as a monocot, belonging to the class Liliopsida.
